decision_rationale: All 5 canary blockers (C-1..C-5) remain OPEN. No maintainer action has been taken to close any blocker since task 39 created the operator packet. No real reviewer, no real volunteer, no branch protection verification, no CODEOWNERS login update, no maintainer availability declaration.

maintainer_decision.note: Maintainer has not signed the decision field in CANARY_GO_LIVE_OPERATOR_PACKET.md. Agent records NO-GO because all blockers remain OPEN per acceptance criteria: canary must not start if any C-1..C-5 blocker is OPEN.

C-1.evidence: PILOT_REVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_AND_APPROVAL_PATH.md sekcja 2.1: all 4 role fields still __DO_UZUPELNIENIA__; sekcja 5 checklist: all checkboxes unchecked
C-1.next_move: Maintainer wypelnia role i loginy GitHub w sekcji 2.1; checks off sekcja 5; wtedy C-1 -> CLOSED

C-2.evidence: BRANCH_PROTECTION_OPERATOR_PACKET.md istnieje, ale weryfikacja nie zostala wykonana — no confirmation of branch protection on main
C-2.next_move: Maintainer wykonuje weryfikacje wg BRANCH_PROTECTION_OPERATOR_PACKET.md kroki 1-4; zapisuje wynik; wtedy C-2 -> CLOSED

C-3.evidence: .github/CODEOWNERS contains only @DO_UZUPELNIENIA_* placeholders — no real GitHub logins present
C-3.next_move: Maintainer zamienia @DO_UZUPELNIENIA_* na prawdziwe loginy GitHub; wtedy C-3 -> CLOSED

C-4.blocker: Reviewer i approver wyznaczeni i dostepni
C-4.evidence: PILOT_REVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_AND_APPROVAL_PATH.md sekcja 2.1: primary_pack_reviewer, backup_reviewer/integrity_reviewer, approver, review_coordinator all __DO_UZUPELNIENIA__
C-4.next_move: Maintainer wypelnia sekcje 2.1 i potwierdza dostepnosc w oknie canary; wtedy C-4 -> CLOSED

C-5.blocker: Dostepnosc maintainera na zywo podczas canary
C-5.evidence: GitHub Issues z labelka volunteer-support istnieja jako baseline; no live channel (Discord/Telegram) confirmed; maintainer has not declared availability window
C-5.next_move: Maintainer deklaruje kanal komunikacji i ramy czasowe dostepnosci; wtedy C-5 -> CLOSED

additional_blockers_from_zadanie_44.note: Export gate is also BLOCKED per zadanie 44 receipt — 14 candidates pending human approval, 0 deferred, 0 human reviews recorded. This compounds the NO-GO: even if canary organizational blockers were closed, there is no reviewer to approve curation results.

canary_run.reason: Cannot start canary run with NO-GO decision — acceptance criteria explicitly prohibit canary start when any C-1..C-5 blocker is OPEN

retro_template_status: NOT_FILLED — canary did not occur, no retro to record
